title: Engagement about 2023 Census data – updated April 2025 | Stats NZ
content:
## Engagement about 2023 Census data – updated April 2025
02 September 2024, 2:00pm
This page provides information about opportunities to learn about 2023 Census products and services.
Our aim is to support existing and potential census customers to use census data, covering a wide range of audiences.
We will refresh this page as we develop engagement opportunities and learning materials. Please check back for updates.

## Building capability with data in communities
A key feature of the 2023 Census is to support iwi and communities to build capability to use data and statistics.
Please contact our regional community engagement managers directly to discuss your data needs. Or make contact at info@stats.govt.nz , and we will connect you with the relevant team.

## Support for census customers
Stats NZ will engage on census data, products, and services to support key releases.
You can contact us at CustomerEngagement@stats.govt.nz

### 2023 Census Your Place, Your Data tour
Between February and April 2025, we hosted sessions in towns and cities across the country to showcase:
- local 2023 Census data and insights
- ways to access 2023 Census data, including interactive demonstrations of key data tools: Aotearoa Data Explorer Place and ethnic group summaries Map gallery.
- Aotearoa Data Explorer
- Place and ethnic group summaries
- other regional data available
- what’s still to come.
- 2023 Census Your Place Your Data tour - Online session presentation Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.2 MB

### 2023 Census Your Place Your Data tour - Online session presentation
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.2 MB

### Census customer capability building
2023 Census customer training modules are now available to support understanding and use of 2023 Census data. These can be self-led online or you can contact CustomerEngagement@stats.govt.nz to arrange a customised training session for your organisation.
Please contact us at the following address with any questions: CustomerEngagement@stats.govt.nz .

## Information resources
We will provide links to key resources on this page as they are developed.
The 2023 Census Your Place, Your Data online session presentation includes:
- 2023 Census data and insights
- ways to access 2023 Census data, including interactive demonstrations of key data tools: Aotearoa Data Explorer Place and ethnic group summaries Map gallery.
- Aotearoa Data Explorer
- Place and ethnic group summaries
- other regional data available
- what is still to come.
- 2023 Census Your Place Your Data tour - Online session presentation Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.2 MB

### 2023 Census Your Place Your Data tour - Online session presentation
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.2 MB
The 2023 Census pre-release technical seminar presentation gives an overview of the 2023 Census, products and services, data quality, the combined census model, population statistics, and the Household Disability Survey.
- 2023 Census pre release technical seminars May 2024 Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 1.7 MB

### 2023 Census pre release technical seminars May 2024
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 1.7 MB
The '2023 Census data and how to access it' seminar presentation includes information on:
- new 2023 Census Individuals and Dwellings data released 3 October 2024
- tools available to access the new data
- services and resources to support data users
- upcoming 2023 Census data releases.
- 2023 Census data and how to access it: seminar presentation October 2024 Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.8 MB

### 2023 Census data and how to access it: seminar presentation October 2024
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.8 MB
2023 Census national and regional data infographics show key national and regional statistics from the 29 May 2024 first release of 2023 Census data.
2023 Census customer training modules available online. These are a useful resource to learn how to access census data and understand it’s quality. The training includes:
- an overview of what the census is and what information we collect
- the methodology used to create the 2023 Census dataset and how we assessed its quality
- what to be aware of when interpreting/analysing census data
- the importance of metadata and where to find it
- the resources and tools available to access the data.
For information on the value of census data, please read stories from communities .

## Customised data requests
Stats NZ offers a customised data service for a range of datasets and surveys, including census data.
Customised data requests for iwi based on individuals and dwellings data can be made from 26 September 2024, and on families and households data from 31 October 2024.
All other customised data requests based on individuals and dwellings data can be made from 3 October 2024, and on families and households data from 7 November 2024.
If you have received census customised data before or would like to use this service, please email info@stats.govt.nz with your requirements.
We will then discuss your request with you including delivery times aligned to census data releases.

## Subscribe to the Census Advisory newsletter
Our bi-monthly newsletter provides updates on announcements, data releases, and other useful information for customers and communities.
Subscribe to our Census Advisory newsletter .
You can contact us with any general enquiries, data requests, and feedback, including any previous census.
Stats NZ freephone: 0508 525 525 (NZ only).
Email info@stats.govt.nz .
For media enquiries about the census, please contact us at media@stats.govt.nz or call 021 285 9191 .
For enquiries about Te Whata iwi data platform please contact Jacky James at jacky@shinecollective.co.nz or call 021 577 871 .
Page updated 22 April 2025
